---
title: "References"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

# Evidence Database

This table is generated from `data/references.csv`.

```{ojs}
references = FileAttachment("data/references.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

## Filter the evidence

```{ojs}
viewof outbreak_filter = Inputs.select(
  ["All", ...new Set(references.map(d => d.Outbreak))],
  {label: "Outbreak"}
)
```

```{ojs}
viewof study_design_filter = Inputs.select(
  ["All", ...new Set(references.map(d => d["Study Design"]))],
  {label: "Study Design"}
)
```

```{ojs}
viewof year_filter = Inputs.select(
  ["All", ...new Set(references.map(d => d.Year))],
  {label: "Year"}
)
```

```{ojs}
filtered_references = references.filter(d =>
  (outbreak_filter === "All" || d.Outbreak === outbreak_filter) &&
  (study_design_filter === "All" || d["Study Design"] === study_design_filter) &&
  (year_filter === "All" || d.Year === year_filter)
)
```

## Browse references

```{ojs}
Inputs.table(filtered_references, {
  columns: ["Title", "Authors", "Year", "Outbreak", "Study Design", "Journal"],
  sort: "Year",
  reverse: true
})
```

<a href="data/references.csv" download="references.csv" class="btn btn-primary">
Download CSV
</a>
